================================================================================
bool
================================================================================

option deprecated = true;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: option},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: =},
    {kind: true},
  {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
int
================================================================================

option age = 42;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: option},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: =},
    {kind: Integer},
  {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
float
================================================================================

option age = 42.5;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: option},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: =},
    {kind: Float},
  {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
string
================================================================================

option go_package = "github.com/Clement-Jean/protein";

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: option},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: =},
    {kind: String},
  {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: EOF},
]
